title: Delete Ink surface + remove ink/react deps (keep picocolors + @clack)
description: Remove the now-dead Ink rendering surface: delete all 10 tui/*.tsx components (6 live output components superseded by ConsoleOutputRenderer in TASK-001, 3 dead interactive components, 1 ProgressBar) plus InkOutputRenderer.ts; trim the tui/index.ts barrel to drop all Ink component + InkOutputRenderer/createInkRenderer exports (including the `InkOutputRenderer as InkOutputRendererType` re-export on line 8) while keeping the types and the new ConsoleOutputRenderer/createInstallRenderer exports; in tui/types.ts delete the dead react import + dead InkOutputRenderer interface (see below); delete packages/cli/__tests__/ink-react-compat.test.ts (it enforces the very deps being removed); and remove the 'ink' + 'react' dependency keys AND the '@types/react' devDependency key from packages/cli/package.json. MUST keep '@clack/prompts' and 'picocolors'. Fix any dangling imports left by the deletions. Keep pipeline.ts unchanged and keep the OutputRenderer interface in tui/types.ts byte-identical (only the dead react import + dead InkOutputRenderer interface are removed there).
action: Delete files: packages/cli/src/tui/{SectionHeader,StepCounter,Spinner,StatusMessage,ErrorBox,SummaryCard,ProgressBar,InputField,StoreWizard,StoreWizardFlow}.tsx and packages/cli/src/tui/InkOutputRenderer.ts and packages/cli/__tests__/ink-react-compat.test.ts. Edit packages/cli/src/tui/types.ts: delete line 1 `import type { ReactNode } from "react";` AND delete the dead `InkOutputRenderer extends OutputRenderer` interface block (~lines 120-130, the one whose members are `renderCustom(node: ReactNode)` + `getInkInstance()`) — this is the SOLE consumer of the react import; leave the `OutputRenderer` interface itself byte-identical and all other types untouched. Edit packages/cli/src/tui/index.ts to remove every export referencing the deleted components and InkOutputRenderer/createInkRenderer, INCLUDING the `InkOutputRenderer as InkOutputRendererType` re-export on line 8, keeping `export * from './types'` (or equivalent type re-exports) and `export { ConsoleOutputRenderer, createInstallRenderer } from './ConsoleOutputRenderer'`. Edit packages/cli/package.json: delete the `"ink": "^4.4.1"` and `"react": "^18.3.1"` dependency lines AND the `"@types/react"` devDependency line (~line 60); leave `"@clack/prompts": "^1.2.0"` and `"picocolors": "^1.1.1"` intact. After deletions, grep for any remaining references to the deleted symbols/paths anywhere under packages/cli/src and packages/cli/__tests__ and fix them (there should be none outside tui/ per the verified map, but confirm). Run pnpm install (or pnpm -w install) to update the lockfile.

criteria: No .tsx files remain under packages/cli/src/tui (find packages/cli/src/tui -name '*.tsx' returns nothing)
packages/cli/package.json has no "ink", "react", or "@types/react" key (grep -E '\"(ink|react|@types/react)\"\s*:' packages/cli/package.json returns nothing)
packages/cli/package.json still has "@clack/prompts" and "picocolors" (grep both present)
packages/cli/src/tui/index.ts exports createInstallRenderer and no longer exports any deleted Ink component name (no `InkOutputRenderer`/`InkOutputRendererType` re-export remains)

OutputRenderer SEAM invariant: `git diff -- packages/cli/src/tui/types.ts` shows ONLY the `import type { ReactNode } from "react";` line removed + the dead `InkOutputRenderer extends OutputRenderer` interface block removed — the `OutputRenderer` interface body is byte-identical (NOT a --quiet full-file pin)
packages/cli/src/tui/types.ts no longer imports react and no longer declares InkOutputRenderer (grep 'from "react"' and grep 'InkOutputRenderer' in types.ts both return nothing)
convergence.verification: find packages/cli/src/tui -name '*.tsx'; test ! -e packages/cli/src/tui/InkOutputRenderer.ts && echo INK_RENDERER_GONE; test ! -e packages/cli/__tests__/ink-react-compat.test.ts && echo COMPAT_TEST_GONE; grep -rn "from \"ink\"\|from 'ink'\|from \"react\"\|from 'react'" packages/cli/src || echo NO_INK_REACT_IMPORTS; grep -rn 'createInkRenderer\|InkOutputRenderer' packages/cli/src || echo NO_INK_SYMBOLS; grep -E '\"(ink|react|@types/react)\"\s*:' packages/cli/package.json || echo NO_INK_REACT_DEPS; grep -E '\"@clack/prompts\"|\"picocolors\"' packages/cli/package.json; git diff --quiet -- packages/cli/src/install/pipeline/pipeline.ts && echo PIPELINE_UNCHANGED; git diff -- packages/cli/src/tui/types.ts && echo 'TYPES_DIFF_SHOWN (must be ONLY react import + dead InkOutputRenderer interface removed; OutputRenderer body byte-identical)'; pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit
convergence.definition_of_done: The Ink/React rendering stack is fully gone from the CLI — no .tsx, no InkOutputRenderer, no ink/react imports or deps, the dep-enforcement test removed — while @clack/prompts and picocolors remain and the type-check stays green.

files.change: Delete file (also: StepCounter.tsx, Spinner.tsx, StatusMessage.tsx, ErrorBox.tsx, SummaryCard.tsx, ProgressBar.tsx, InputField.tsx, StoreWizard.tsx, StoreWizardFlow.tsx)
Delete file — replaced by ConsoleOutputRenderer in TASK-001

Remove all Ink component exports + InkOutputRenderer/createInkRenderer exports, INCLUDING the `InkOutputRenderer as InkOutputRendererType` re-export on line 8; keep types re-export and ConsoleOutputRenderer/createInstallRenderer export

files.target: dead react import (line 1) + dead InkOutputRenderer interface (~lines 120-130)
files.change: Delete `import type { ReactNode } from "react";` and the dead `InkOutputRenderer extends OutputRenderer` interface block (members renderCustom(node: ReactNode) + getInkInstance()) — the only consumers of the react import. Leave the OutputRenderer interface and all other types byte-identical.
Delete — it asserts ink===^4.4.1 && react===^18.3.1, enforcing the deps being removed
Remove "ink": "^4.4.1" and "react": "^18.3.1" from dependencies AND "@types/react" from devDependencies (~line 60); keep "@clack/prompts": "^1.2.0" and "picocolors": "^1.1.1"

implementation: Confirm ConsoleOutputRenderer.ts exists and tui/index.ts already exports createInstallRenderer (TASK-001 output) before deleting anything.
Delete all 10 tui/*.tsx files and InkOutputRenderer.ts.
Edit tui/types.ts: delete line 1 react import + the dead InkOutputRenderer interface block (~lines 120-130); leave the OutputRenderer interface byte-identical.

Edit tui/index.ts: strip every export of a deleted component and of InkOutputRenderer/createInkRenderer (including the line-8 `InkOutputRenderer as InkOutputRendererType` re-export); keep types + ConsoleOutputRenderer/createInstallRenderer.
Edit packages/cli/package.json: remove the ink + react dependency lines AND the @types/react devDependency line; keep @clack/prompts + picocolors.

grep -rn across packages/cli/src and __tests__ for any dangling reference to deleted symbols/paths (createInkRenderer, InkOutputRenderer, ReactNode, the component names, react, ink) and fix any that remain.
Run pnpm install to refresh the lockfile, then pnpm -r exec tsc --noEmit until green (the dead react import must be gone, else tsc fails once react/@types/react are removed).

success_metrics: no .tsx under tui/, no InkOutputRenderer.ts, no ink-react-compat.test.ts
no ink/react imports or deps, no @types/react devDep; @clack + picocolors retained
tui/types.ts: react import + dead InkOutputRenderer interface removed, OutputRenderer body byte-identical

reference.pattern: Strangler-fig deletion phase after replacement is live

rationale.chosen_approach: Delete only after TASK-001's replacement is wired and type-checks, so the tree never has a broken renderer; removing ink-react-compat.test.ts is required because it actively enforces the deps under removal.
decision_factors: C-001 mandates deleting ink + react (and the @types/react devDep that only typed the now-dead react usage)
Interactive Ink components are dead (verified no caller outside tui/) so deletion is safe

The dead InkOutputRenderer interface + its `import type { ReactNode } from "react"` in types.ts are the sole remaining react references; they must be deleted here or tsc fails once react/@types/react are removed (the react-import-vs-byte-pin contradiction the plan-checker flagged)
ink-react-compat.test.ts would otherwise fail by design once deps are gone
rationale.tradeoffs: Removing ink-react-compat.test.ts loses a dep-pin guard, but its intent inverts under W3-A; absence-of-ink is re-asserted by TASK-003 grep gates. types.ts is no longer fully byte-pinned (the dead InkOutputRenderer interface + react import are removed); the narrower OutputRenderer-body-byte-identical invariant replaces it.

risks: A dangling import outside tui/ would break tsc — mitigated by the post-deletion grep sweep (verified map says none exist, but confirm).
Forgetting the types.ts react-import/dead-interface deletion would leave a react reference that breaks tsc once react + @types/react are removed — delete it in this task.
Forgetting to refresh the lockfile after editing package.json — run pnpm install.
